description: Removed India and Pakistan from audience targeting
Deployed new app version with onboarding/setup screens before the login screen
Removed 'Babblo banner (wider)_1.91:1.png' image asset and YouTube video asset from campaign
Switched to allowlist targeting: GB, IE, FR, DE, ES, IT, NL, BE, PT, AT, CH, US, CA, AU, NZ, JP, KR, SG, HK, TW, AE, SA, QA
Removed native language selection screen from onboarding — now inferred from device locale
Reverted to all locations (removed allowlist targeting restriction)
Removed Interests selection screen from onboarding
Added India, Bangladesh, Nepal and Pakistan to blocklist targeting
Added new 'App Opened' PostHog event firing at app launch before any loading or navigation logic, to provide a true top-of-funnel baseline
Moved 'Onboarding Started' PostHog event to fire as soon as new user is detected (before any screen renders), rather than inside the onboarding screen component
Replaced plain black loading screen with branded Babblo logo screen to reduce users closing the app during initialisation on slow devices
Removed email account creation (email login retained for existing users); all new signups via Google only
Auto-start call at end of onboarding — call begins immediately after account creation instead of requiring user to slide to call
Added Microphone Permission Requested and Microphone Permission Denied PostHog events around getUserMedia()
app_version now automatically merged into every PostHog event via analytics.track()
paywall_viewed now tracks source prop (call_screen, settings_menu, deep_link)
Bug fix: tutorial image oversized in production — capped at SCREEN_HEIGHT * 0.5
Bug fix: flashcard filling screen on cold start — wrapped PanGestureHandler in explicit-dimensioned View to fix Reanimated initialisation issue
Bug fix: black SettingsMenu — Modal renders outside root ErrorBoundary; added ErrorBoundary wrapper inside Modal to surface silent errors
Google Ads: switched to allowlist targeting (FR, DE, GB, IE, IT, ES, NL, BE, PT, CH, AT, US, CA, AU, NZ, JP, KR, SG, HK, TW, AE, SA, QA); daily budget increased from €10 to €20
Apple Search Ads Basic campaign created (max CPI €1.27, monthly budget €150); status pending Apple review before going live
Google Ads: increased daily budget from €20 to €40 — CPA running at €0.05 vs €0.20 target (4x headroom), campaign flagged as 'Limited by budget soon'

Launched Topics section: users can select a conversation topic before starting a call. Also improved onboarding visuals with 2 new onboarding screens (target language selection + topic for first conversation) shown before the Login screen.
Google Ads: raised target CPI from €0.20 to €3.00 and reduced daily budget from €40 to €20 — previous €0.20 target was uncompetitive in western markets, causing near-zero spend
Set up A/B test on paywall pricing — 50% of users see half-price offering
